questions.hindi: महोदय, मैं आपसे तीन दिन की छुट्टी की विनती करता हूँ।
options: I need to change my city because of my family.
I am a student of this school.
I want leave because I am unwell.
Sir, I request three days of leave from you.
questions.answer: Sir, I request three days of leave from you.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "महोदय, मैं आपसे तीन दिन की छुट्टी की विनती करता हूँ।" = "Sir, I request three days of leave from you."

questions.sentence: I want leave _____ I am unwell.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I want leave because I am unwell."
Correct sentence: "Please approve my leave."

questions.hindi: मैं इस पद के लिए आवेदन करना चाहता हूँ।
options: I hope for your positive reply.
I have sufficient experience for this job.
I would like to apply for this position.
questions.answer: I would like to apply for this position.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं इस पद के लिए आवेदन करना चाहता हूँ।" = "I would like to apply for this position."

questions.sentence: I have sufficient _____ for this job.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I have sufficient experience for this job."
Correct sentence: "Please accept my application."

questions.hindi: मैं स्थानांतरण के लिए आवेदन कर रहा हूँ।
options: Sir, I request three days of leave from you.
I need to change my city because of my family.
I am applying for a transfer.
questions.answer: I am applying for a transfer.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं स्थानांतरण के लिए आवेदन कर रहा हूँ।" = "I am applying for a transfer."

questions.sentence: I need to change my _____ because of my family.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I need to change my city because of my family."

questions.sentence: I am applying for a scholarship yesterday.
options: I am applying for a scholarship yesterday.
I am applying for a scholarship.
questions.answer: I am applying for a scholarship.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I am applying for a scholarship."

questions.hindi: मेरे अंक इस छात्रवृत्ति के लिए पर्याप्त हैं।
options: I would like to apply for this position.
My marks are sufficient for this scholarship.
questions.answer: My marks are sufficient for this scholarship.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मेरे अंक इस छात्रवृत्ति के लिए पर्याप्त हैं।" = "My marks are sufficient for this scholarship."
Full sentence: "I need a bonafide certificate."

questions.sentence: I need this certificate to open a bank account yesterday.
options: I need this certificate to open a bank account yesterday.
I need this certificate to open a bank account.
questions.answer: I need this certificate to open a bank account.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I need this certificate to open a bank account."

questions.hindi: सधन्यवाद, मैं आपकी शीघ्र प्रतिक्रिया की प्रतीक्षा करूँगा।
options: I will be grateful for this opportunity.
I am applying for a transfer.
Thank you, I will wait for your prompt response.
questions.answer: Thank you, I will wait for your prompt response.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "सधन्यवाद, मैं आपकी शीघ्र प्रतिक्रिया की प्रतीक्षा करूँगा।" = "Thank you, I will wait for your prompt response."
Full sentence: "Yours sincerely."

questions.sentence: I am a student of this school yesterday.
options: I am a student of this school yesterday.
I am a student of this school.
questions.answer: I am a student of this school.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I am a student of this school."

options: My marks are sufficient for this scholarship.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मेरा रोल नंबर पच्चीस है।" = "My roll number is twenty-five."
Full sentence: "Please approve this immediately."

questions.sentence: I hope for your positive reply yesterday.
options: I hope for your positive reply yesterday.
I hope for your positive reply.
questions.answer: I hope for your positive reply.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I hope for your positive reply."

options: Thank you, I will wait for your prompt response.
I will be grateful for this opportunity.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "यह मेरा पहला आवेदन है।" = "This is my first application."

questions.sentence: I will be _____ for this opportunity.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I will be grateful for this opportunity."
